summary: PR 2206 matched the item source file for Lipstick by adding the itlipstick item state table, adding the item forward declarations include needed by that table, changing itlipstick.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, and correcting one .sdata2 float symbol at 0x804DCB68 from a global it_804DCB68 name to a local @158 label.

key_files.role: Main decomp source update; adds forward include and defines ItemStateTable it_803F6310 with Lipstick motion callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/itlipstick.c hunk adds #include "it/items/forward.h" and ItemStateTable it_803F6310[]

key_files.role: Build matching status update; changes melee/it/items/itlipstick.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itlipstick.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itlipstick.c")

key_files.role: Symbol metadata update; changes .sdata2:0x804DCB68 from global it_804DCB68 to local @158.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt hunk changes it_804DCB68 to @158 at .sdata2:0x804DCB68

what_changed.text: Added #include "it/items/forward.h" to itlipstick.c before including itlipstickspore.h.
Added ItemStateTable it_803F6310[] with six entries using itLipstick_UnkMotion* Anim, Phys, and Coll callbacks, including one NULL collision callback in the third entry.
Changed configure.py so melee/it/items/itlipstick.c is built as Matching instead of NonMatching.
Changed the .sdata2 symbol at 0x804DCB68 from global float it_804DCB68 to local float @158.

smart_moves.text: The PR keeps the source change narrow: the main C update is a state table plus the include required to name item callbacks, with matching status and symbol metadata adjusted separately.
evidence_refs: changed_files: total added/deleted counts show a small focused diff

smart_moves.text: The symbol edit avoids keeping an address-style global name for a float that the diff represents as a local .sdata2 label.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt changes it_804DCB68 to @158 with scope:local

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item objects, recovering the ItemStateTable definition can be the central missing source needed to move an item file to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes itlipstick.c from NonMatching to Matching

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a matching source recovery changes how a float constant is owned, update symbols.txt metadata to the supported local/global label form rather than compensating in C source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: .sdata2:0x804DCB68 changed from global it_804DCB68 to local @158

naming_conventions.text: The added item state table uses an address-style global name, it_803F6310, rather than inventing a semantic table name.
The .sdata2 float at 0x804DCB68 is represented as a local generated label @158, not as global it_804DCB68.
Callback names retain the existing itLipstick_UnkMotionN_Anim/Phys/Coll convention shown in the added table.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Promote the source file to Matching only after adding the missing item state table and adjusting related symbol metadata.
Use a local .sdata2 label for a float constant when symbol metadata indicates the value is local to the matched output.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number/title/author/state/timestamps and changed file counts
raw_diff: complete diff for three changed files
notes: The diff and changed-file metadata are complete and directly support what changed.
There is no PR body, review comment, issue comment, build log, objdiff output, or regression ledger in the slice.
The configure.py change to Object(Matching) supports that the PR claimed/recorded matching status, but the slice does not include independent verifier output.
No reviewer intent or review feedback can be inferred because no reviews or comments are present.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Item state table recovery can close an item file match
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2206, adding ItemStateTable it_803F6310[] in src/melee/it/items/itlipstick.c coincided with changing the file from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py. This supports a narrow lesson that missing item state table definitions may be a key blocker for item file matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes itlipstick.c to Object(Matching)

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer symbol metadata correction over fake C ownership for local .sdata2 floats
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2206 changes .sdata2:0x804DCB68 from global it_804DCB68 to local @158 in symbols.txt while matching itlipstick.c, providing evidence that symbol metadata may need to be corrected when recovering item source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804DCB68 to @158 with scope:local

rejection_notes: Do not infer a general rule that all it_* float globals should become local labels; this PR shows only one .sdata2 address.
Do not claim objdiff/checkdiff verification details beyond the configure.py Matching status because no verifier output is included.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or requested changes because the slice includes no reviews or comments.
